title: Hashrate Heist or Hype?
relevance_summary: 51% attack on Monero using incentivized mining pool with triple profitability

prevention.rule: Block any tx that involves a validator voting to orphan blocks from other miners after achieving 51% hashrate

attacker_addresses: Not explicitly mentioned but likely related to Qubic validators
monitoring_rules: Block any tx that involves a validator voting to orphan blocks from other miners after achieving 51% hashrate
summary: Qubic incentivized Monero miners to join their pool, increasing their hashrate to 51%, and then voted to orphan blocks from other miners. This attack could have been prevented by monitoring validator votes after achieving 51% hashrate.
